name: Magical Citadel of Endymion
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>法</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>都</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>と</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>市</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>エンディミオン
desc: Each time a Spell Card is activated, place 1 Spell Counter on this card when that Spell resolves. If a card with a Spell Counter(s) is destroyed, place its Spell Counters on this card. Once per turn, if you would activate a card effect by removing a Spell Counter(s) from a card you control, you can remove that many Spell Counters from this card instead. If this card would be destroyed, you can remove 1 Spell Counter from this card instead.
eff: Each time a Spell Card is activated, place 1 Spell Counter on this card when that Spell resolves. If a card with a Spell Counter(s) is destroyed, place its Spell Counters on this card. Once per turn, if you would activate a card effect by removing a Spell Counter(s) from a card you control, you can remove that many Spell Counters from this card instead. If this card would be destroyed, you can remove 1 Spell Counter from this card instead.

sets.set: Structure Deck: Order of the Spellcasters

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck R: Lord of Magician

counter: Removes counters from itself for cost
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
